title: vault.accessed (v1)
description: Published by the Credential Vault Service when a token is retrieved by the Approvals Service for automated purchase or listing. Recorded in the audit log only. See TDD Sections 3.2.1, 5.5.

user_id.description: The user whose stored credential was accessed.

sell_channel.description: The sell channel whose token was retrieved.

requesting_service.description: The service that requested the token (e.g. 'approvals-service').

accessed_at.description: Timestamp when the token was accessed.

approval_id.description: The approval that triggered this access, if applicable.
